svg.aria-label: about — Ahmed Shalaby — Full Stack AI Developer — Aerospace Engineer
svg.title: about — Ahmed Shalaby
svg.desc: Ahmed Shalaby · Full Stack AI Developer · Aerospace Engineer. Aerospace Engineer turned builder. Ships AI-native SaaS, real-time systems, and the occasional satellite visualization across AI, Web3, IoT, and commerce. Mostly TypeScript, always in production. Queen Mary University of London BEng First Class Hons. Based in Egypt.

g.font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, monospace
